utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Each one appears to be fully specified with the required details: health_coverage has both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs; and total_budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists all policies provided by LifeFirst. To map them, I look up the ground-truth ratings for LifeFirst options in each category. For physical health, the LifeFirst Standard Plan has a rating of 8. For mental health, the LifeFirst Standard Plan also has a rating of 8. For property coverage, the LifeFirst Standard Coverage has a rating of 8. For travel coverage, the LifeFirst Standard Plan has a rating of 7. For additional services, the plan named 'Premium membership including concierge, wellness, telemedicine, priority claims, and dedicated advisor' corresponds to the 'Premium Insurance Membership' under general_services, which has a rating of 10.
